content.json:
# Foundry operations dashboard
PTU capacity, traffic and tokens, latency, and errors for Azure AI Foundry / Azure OpenAI deployments.

parameters.name: Deployment
parameters.label: Deployment
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'AzureOpenAIRequestUsage'
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName)
| where isnotempty(Deployment)
| distinct Deployment
| order by Deployment asc

parameters.name: Model
parameters.label: Model
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'AzureOpenAIRequestUsage'
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Model = tostring(props.modelName)
| where isnotempty(Model)
| distinct Model
| order by Model asc

content.json:
## Foundry / Azure OpenAI operations dashboard
This workbook is scoped **per Azure OpenAI resource** and **per Log Analytics workspace**. Pick the subscription, workspace, and Azure OpenAI resource above, then use the deployment, model, time-range, and streaming filters to narrow each tab.

> **PTU_Normalizado** is a display-only scaling series (`PTU% * 100000`). It exists so the 0-100 PTU utilization percentage can share a Y axis with raw token counts in a single timechart. It is not a real token volume - read the true utilization from **PTU_Avg_Pct** / **PTU_Max_Pct**.

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where MetricName in ('AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2','Ratelimit','TokenTransaction','ProcessedPromptTokens')
| extend Deployment = tostring(split(Resource, '/')[-1])
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| summarize PTU_Avg_Pct = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2'),
    PTU_Max_Pct = maxif(Maximum, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2'),
    Ratelimit = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'Ratelimit'),
    ProcessedTokens = sumif(Total, MetricName in ('TokenTransaction','ProcessedPromptTokens'))
    by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), Deployment
| extend Spillover = max_of(0.0, ProcessedTokens - Ratelimit)
| extend Aggregated_PTU_With_Spillover = ProcessedTokens
| extend PTU_Normalizado = PTU_Avg_Pct * 100000
| project TimeGenerated, PTU_Avg_Pct, PTU_Max_Pct, Ratelimit, Spillover, Aggregated_PTU_With_Spillover, PTU_Normalizado
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: PTU utilization and PAYG spillover

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where MetricName in ('AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2','Ratelimit','TokenTransaction','ProcessedPromptTokens')
| extend Deployment = tostring(split(Resource, '/')[-1])
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| summarize PTU_Avg_Pct = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2'),
    PTU_Max_Pct = maxif(Maximum, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2'),
    Ratelimit = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'Ratelimit'),
    ProcessedTokens = sumif(Total, MetricName in ('TokenTransaction','ProcessedPromptTokens'))
    by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), Deployment
| extend Spillover = max_of(0.0, ProcessedTokens - Ratelimit)
| extend Aggregated_PTU_With_Spillover = ProcessedTokens
| extend PTU_Normalizado = PTU_Avg_Pct * 100000
| project TimeGenerated, PTU_Avg_Pct, PTU_Max_Pct, Ratelimit, Spillover, Aggregated_PTU_With_Spillover, PTU_Normalizado
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Capacity summary (per bin)

content.json:
### Traffic and tokens
Call volume and token consumption broken down by deployment and model. The PTU vs PAYG pivot splits token volume by capacity type (streaming traffic maps to PTU, non-streaming overflow to PAYG spillover).

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'AzureOpenAIRequestUsage'
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName), Model = tostring(props.modelName), StreamType = tostring(props.streamType),
    PromptTokens = toreal(props.promptTokens[0]), GeneratedTokens = toreal(props.generatedTokens[0])
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| where '{Model}' == 'value::all' or Model == '{Model}'
| where '{StreamType}' == '*' or StreamType == '{StreamType}'
| summarize AzureOpenAIRequests = count(), InputTokens = sum(PromptTokens), OutputTokens = sum(GeneratedTokens),
    ProcessedPromptTokens = sum(PromptTokens) by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Deployment, Model
| extend TotalTokens = InputTokens + OutputTokens, GeneratedTokens = OutputTokens, TotalCalls = AzureOpenAIRequests
| extend TokensPorRequest = iff(AzureOpenAIRequests > 0, ProcessedPromptTokens / AzureOpenAIRequests, 0.0)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Calls and tokens over time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'AzureOpenAIRequestUsage'
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName), Model = tostring(props.modelName), StreamType = tostring(props.streamType),
    PromptTokens = toreal(props.promptTokens[0]), GeneratedTokens = toreal(props.generatedTokens[0])
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| where '{Model}' == 'value::all' or Model == '{Model}'
| where '{StreamType}' == '*' or StreamType == '{StreamType}'
| summarize AzureOpenAIRequests = count(), InputTokens = sum(PromptTokens), OutputTokens = sum(GeneratedTokens),
    ProcessedPromptTokens = sum(PromptTokens) by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Deployment, Model
| extend TotalTokens = InputTokens + OutputTokens, GeneratedTokens = OutputTokens, TotalCalls = AzureOpenAIRequests
| extend TokensPorRequest = iff(AzureOpenAIRequests > 0, ProcessedPromptTokens / AzureOpenAIRequests, 0.0)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Tokens per request (by deployment and model)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'AzureOpenAIRequestUsage'
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName), StreamType = tostring(props.streamType),
    PromptTokens = toreal(props.promptTokens[0]), GeneratedTokens = toreal(props.generatedTokens[0])
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| extend CapacityType = iff(StreamType == 'Streaming', 'PTU', 'PAYGO_SPILLOVER')
| summarize Tokens = sum(PromptTokens + GeneratedTokens) by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), CapacityType
| evaluate pivot(CapacityType, sum(Tokens))
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: PTU vs PAYG spillover (token volume)

content.json:
### Latency
Normalized Azure OpenAI latency metrics (TTFT, TBT, TTLT, tokens/sec, time-to-response) plus P95/P99/Avg/Max computed from per-request `DurationMs`.

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where MetricName in ('AzureOpenAINormalizedTTFTInMS','AzureOpenAINormalizedTBTInMS','AzureOpenAITTLTInMS','AzureOpenAITokenPerSecond','AzureOpenAITimeToResponse','Latency')
| extend Deployment = tostring(split(Resource, '/')[-1])
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| summarize TTFT_Ms = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAINormalizedTTFTInMS'),
    TBT_Ms = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAINormalizedTBTInMS'),
    TTLT_Ms = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAITTLTInMS'),
    TokensPerSecond = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAITokenPerSecond'),
    TimeToResponse_Ms = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAITimeToResponse'),
    Latency_Ms = avgif(Average, MetricName == 'Latency') by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Normalized latency and throughput

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where OperationName in ('ChatCompletions_Create','RequestResponse')
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName), StreamType = tostring(props.streamType)
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| where '{StreamType}' == '*' or StreamType == '{StreamType}'
| where isnotnull(DurationMs)
| summarize P95LatencyMs = percentile(DurationMs, 95), P99LatencyMs = percentile(DurationMs, 99),
    AvgLatencyMs = avg(DurationMs), MaxLatencyMs = max(DurationMs) by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: DurationMs percentiles (P95 / P99 / Avg / Max)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where OperationName in ('ChatCompletions_Create','RequestResponse')
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName), StreamType = tostring(props.streamType)
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| where '{StreamType}' == '*' or StreamType == '{StreamType}'
| where isnotnull(DurationMs)
| summarize P95LatencyMs = percentile(DurationMs, 95), P99LatencyMs = percentile(DurationMs, 99),
    AvgLatencyMs = avg(DurationMs), MaxLatencyMs = max(DurationMs) by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Latency percentiles (per bin)

content.json:
### Errors and throttling
HTTP status breakdown (429 / 400 / 500), blocked calls, and derived throttling / error rates.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where OperationName in ('ChatCompletions_Create','RequestResponse')
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName), StreamType = tostring(props.streamType), Status = toint(ResultSignature)
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| where '{StreamType}' == '*' or StreamType == '{StreamType}'
| summarize TotalRequests = count(), HTTP429 = countif(Status == 429), HTTP400 = countif(Status == 400),
    HTTP500 = countif(Status >= 500 and Status < 600), Successful = countif(Status == 200)
    by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend BlockedCalls = HTTP429
| extend TasaThrottling_Pct = iff(TotalRequests > 0, todouble(HTTP429) / TotalRequests * 100, 0.0)
| extend TasaError_Pct = iff(TotalRequests > 0, todouble(TotalRequests - Successful) / TotalRequests * 100, 0.0)
| project TimeGenerated, BlockedCalls, HTTP429, HTTP400, HTTP500, TasaThrottling_Pct, TasaError_Pct
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: HTTP status counts over time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where OperationName in ('ChatCompletions_Create','RequestResponse')
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName), StreamType = tostring(props.streamType), Status = toint(ResultSignature)
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| where '{StreamType}' == '*' or StreamType == '{StreamType}'
| summarize TotalRequests = count(), HTTP429 = countif(Status == 429), HTTP400 = countif(Status == 400),
    HTTP500 = countif(Status >= 500 and Status < 600), Successful = countif(Status == 200)
    by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend BlockedCalls = HTTP429
| extend TasaThrottling_Pct = iff(TotalRequests > 0, todouble(HTTP429) / TotalRequests * 100, 0.0)
| extend TasaError_Pct = iff(TotalRequests > 0, todouble(TotalRequests - Successful) / TotalRequests * 100, 0.0)
| project TimeGenerated, BlockedCalls, HTTP429, HTTP400, HTTP500, TasaThrottling_Pct, TasaError_Pct
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Throttling rate and error rate (%)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where OperationName in ('ChatCompletions_Create','RequestResponse')
| extend props = parse_json(properties_s)
| extend Deployment = tostring(props.modelDeploymentName), StreamType = tostring(props.streamType), Status = toint(ResultSignature)
| where '{Deployment}' == 'value::all' or Deployment == '{Deployment}'
| where '{StreamType}' == '*' or StreamType == '{StreamType}'
| summarize TotalRequests = count(), HTTP429 = countif(Status == 429), HTTP400 = countif(Status == 400),
    HTTP500 = countif(Status >= 500 and Status < 600), Successful = countif(Status == 200)
    by TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend BlockedCalls = HTTP429
| extend TasaThrottling_Pct = iff(TotalRequests > 0, todouble(HTTP429) / TotalRequests * 100, 0.0)
| extend TasaError_Pct = iff(TotalRequests > 0, todouble(TotalRequests - Successful) / TotalRequests * 100, 0.0)
| project TimeGenerated, BlockedCalls, HTTP429, HTTP400, HTTP500, TasaThrottling_Pct, TasaError_Pct
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Errors and throttling (per bin)
